name: Deconstruct Planner
description: Deconstruct a planner into the robot cell it currently holds: its robot_cell and robot_model. Read from the planner's client; each output is None until a cell has been loaded. The cell state is not exposed (the client's state is rarely the one you want).

inputParameters.name: planner
inputParameters.description: A planner (MoveItPlanner, PyBulletPlanner, AnalyticalKinematicsPlanner, …) that has had a robot cell set on it.

outputParameters.name: robot_cell
outputParameters.description: The RobotCell currently held by the planner's client. None if no cell has been loaded yet.

outputParameters.name: robot_model
outputParameters.description: The cell's RobotModel (`robot_cell.robot_model`). None if no cell has been loaded yet.
